messages.content: translate入围率
The rate of being shortlisted.
rephrase offline investors have aaverage success rate of  78% of subscribing the 10 ipos
On average, offline investors are successful in subscribing to 78% of the 10 IPOs.
rephraseagain
On average, offline investors have a subscription success rate of 78% for the 10 IPOs.
translate 避免种业卡脖子
Avoid being constrained by the seed industry.
translate map业务有助于实现中国农业现代化，藏粮于地，藏粮于技，帮助农民种出好品质，卖出好价钱
The MAP business helps to achieve modernization of agriculture in China, by storing grains in the ground and using technology to help farmers grow high-quality crops and sell them at good prices.
translate 先正达集团是全球领先的农业科技公司。先正达集团的植保业务全球第一、种子业务全球第三。作为中国农业领域的国家队，先正达集团积极响应中央粮食安全、种业振兴、数字农业等政策的号召

Syngenta Group is a global leading agricultural technology company. Syngenta's crop protection business is ranked first in the world, and its seed business is ranked third. As a national team in the field of agriculture in China, Syngenta Group actively responds to the call of policies such as food security, seed industry revitalization, and digital agriculture.
translate 先正达集团的植保业务全球第一、种子业务全球第三
Syngenta Group's crop protection business is ranked first in the world, and its seed business is ranked third globally.
translate 先正达集团的植保业务全球第一、种子业务全球第三 in one sentence
Syngenta Group is globally ranked first in the crop protection business and third in the seed business.
translate 化肥业务
Fertilizer business.
translate 卡脖子
To constrain or restrict someone or something.
translate 中共中央　国务院关于做好2023年全面推进乡村振兴重点工作的意见
Opinions of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China and the State Council on Doing Key Work Well in the Comprehensive Promotion of Rural Revitalization in 2023.
